title: A Study of Signal-less Intersection Control by Mutual Cooperative Learning between Automated Vehicles and Intersection Control Agent
authors: Kenji Matsuda, Tenta Suzuki, Tomohiro Harada, Johei Matsuoka, Jyunya Hoshino, Yuki Itoh, Kaito Kumagae, Toshinori Kagawa, Kiyohiko Hattori
venue: Proceedings of the 8th International Symposium on Swarm Behavior and Bio-Inspired Robotics (SWARM2024)
